SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks

Class Deck

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.Deck
Direct Known Subclasses:
GoldDeck, ObjectiveDeck, ResourceDeck, StartDeck
public abstract class Deck extends Object
The Deck abstract class represent the idea of a generic list of cards.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected List<Card>
    cards
    The list of cards that represents the deck; it has package visibility.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Deck()
    The constructor of the abstract class Deck creates the list that will contain the cards.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract Card
    drawCard()
    The drawCard() method checks if the deck is empty and if it is throws an exception.
    Back
    firstBack()
    The firstBack() method returns the Back of the first Card of the list.
    protected abstract void
    initializeDeck(CardCreator cc)
    The abstract method initializeDeck(cc) uses the object CardCreator to create the list of cards by reading them from a .json file specified in the subclass.
    boolean
    isEmpty()
    The isEmpty() method is used by non-package classes to know if the list of cards in the deck is empty either before or after accessing it.
    protected void
    shuffle()
    The shuffle() method will randomize the position of the cards in the list so that we can always pick the first one of the pile when calling the method drawCard().

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • cards

      protected List<Card> cards
      The list of cards that represents the deck; it has package visibility.

  • Constructor Details

    • Deck

      public Deck()
      The constructor of the abstract class Deck creates the list that will contain the cards.

  • Method Details

    • initializeDeck

      protected abstract void initializeDeck(CardCreator cc)
      The abstract method initializeDeck(cc) uses the object CardCreator to create the list of cards by reading them from a .json file specified in the subclass. It is an abstract method that will be implemented in the subclasses. It has package visibility and will be called only once, at the end of the Constructor of the subclasses.
      Parameters:
      cc - the CardCreator object that will create the cards.

    • shuffle

      protected void shuffle()
      The shuffle() method will randomize the position of the cards in the list so that we can always pick the first one of the pile when calling the method drawCard(). It has package visibility and will only be called once, at the end of the initializeDeck() method.

    • drawCard

      public abstract Card drawCard() throws NoCardsException
      The drawCard() method checks if the deck is empty and if it is throws an exception. If it isn't empty the method gets the first card of the list and saves it before removing it from the list, then it returns the card saved.
      Returns:
      c the card that is drawn from the top of the deck
      Throws:
      NoCardsException - the exception prints the string in the console so that the user knows he will not be able to draw again.

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      The isEmpty() method is used by non-package classes to know if the list of cards in the deck is empty either before or after accessing it.
      Returns:
      true if the list is empty, false if the list is not empty.

    • firstBack

      public Back firstBack()
      The firstBack() method returns the Back of the first Card of the list. It is needed to tell the view what is the colour of the Card that will be drawn next. If the deck contains Objective or Start Cards it returns null.
      Returns:
      The Back of the first Card of the list.
